emails.subject: Mariner Doorstep Report
emails.body: Attached is the Mariner Doorstep Report. Jim Brown indicated that the action dates for the three findings should be immediately, we decided that October 1 was a realistic deadline for implementation. Please let us know any comments or questions. Thank You Kate

emails.subject: Re: Mariner Doorstep Report
emails.body: Re: Mariner Doorstep Report Dear Kate, We are now ranking the findings red or yellow. Since these need to be done immediately, I suggest that they are red findings. Regards Kate Agnew 08/15/2000 01:59 PM
